## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run build` passes
- [ ] E2E updated/added where relevant (`pnpm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] Accessibility considered (keyboard, contrast, reduced motion)
- [ ] SEO/metadata considered where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated (README / relevant `*.md`)
